name: Liora Vale
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, noble courier woman with torn cloak, stubborn gaze, bruised but unbroken, torchlit dungeon, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: If you’ve come to bargain, I have nothing. If you’ve come to rescue, be quiet.

nodes.text: They took me for what I carried — not who I am. Their officers speak of a ‘sight orb’ being moved deeper. And they’re terrified of losing it.

name: Old Scribe
portraitPrompt: fantasy character portrait, elderly scribe in rags, ink-stained fingers, haunted eyes, dungeon bars, painterly, no text

dialogue.greeting: Walls have ears. Floors have teeth.

nodes.text: There’s a maintenance slit behind the cistern. Leads to the chain gallery. Don’t go where the drums echo.

choices.label: Thank him and ask about keys.
